'''Toniv''' was an officer of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Navy]].

In [[4 BBY/Legends|4 BBY]], [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] Toniv served as the [[Executive officer/Legends|executive officer]] under [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel]] aboard ''[[Pride of the Senate]]'' during the [[Battle of Nar Shaddaa (4 BBY)|Battle of Nar Shaddaa]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Hutt Gambit]]'' {{1st}}
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 25|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 25]] {{1stp}} {{Flash}}
